metadata.homeTitle: Visia, the platform to get mentioned by AI
metadata.homeDescription: Measure your visibility in ChatGPT, Gemini and Perplexity, then fix what keeps your brand from being recommended.
metadata.loginDescription: Sign in to Visia to continue your AI visibility analysis and access your workspace.
metadata.registerDescription: Create your Visia account to start measuring and improving your presence in AI answers.

auth.loginSubtitle: Welcome back, continue your authentication flow.
auth.registerSubtitle: Create your access in under 30 seconds.
auth.otpRegister: Create my account with email code
auth.sideDescription: Unified login and registration with password, email OTP and Google OIDC.

errorPage.title: Authentication interrupted
errorPage.subtitle: The authentication flow could not be completed. You can retry the sign-in or create a fresh account flow.
errorPage.genericReason: Kratos redirected to the error page, but no additional message was provided.
errorPage.unavailableReason: The detailed Kratos error is no longer available. Start a fresh sign-in flow and try again.

messages.logoutSuccess: Logout successful, the session cookie has been cleared.
messages.passwordFallback: Failed to complete the password authentication flow.
messages.otpStartFallback: Failed to start the OTP flow.
messages.otpVerifyFallback: Failed to verify the OTP code.
messages.googleFallback: Failed to start the Google flow.

hero.description: When a buyer asks an AI which tool to choose, is your brand mentioned or invisible? Visia shows what really surfaces and what to fix to become recommendable.

items.title: Measure your AI visibility
items.description: Run targeted prompts across multiple LLMs and finally see whether your brand appears, how it is described and which competitors show up instead.

items.title: Find what is holding you back
items.description: Spot the pages, brand signals and content gaps that keep AIs from understanding, citing or recommending you.

items.title: Prioritize the right fixes
items.description: Turn observations into a concrete action plan for SEO, content, social proof and the structure of your pages.

items.title: Prove impact over time
items.description: Track visibility trends, compare outcomes by model and show progress clearly to the rest of your team.

steps.title: Connect your brand
steps.description: Add your site, key pages and competitors to define the comparison space.

steps.title: Run your scenarios
steps.description: Test the real questions your buyers already ask in ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, Gemini and more.

steps.title: Get the diagnosis
steps.description: See who gets cited, which narratives surface and what content angles are missing for your brand.

steps.title: Fix and monitor
steps.description: Apply recommendations, rerun the tests and measure whether your brand is gaining presence.

infrastructure.description: Monitor the engines that matter with stable histories, clean answer parsing and a dependable view of how your brand appears over time.

integrations.title: Connect your sources.
integrations.subtitle: In minutes.
integrations.description: Combine AI visibility with traffic, pipeline and revenue using the tools already present in your stack.

developers.description: Pull raw visibility data, wire your own workflows and plug Visia into internal tooling without depending on the UI.

api.title: REST API
api.description: List analyses, scores, citations and recommendations from your own dashboards.

mcp.title: MCP server
mcp.description: Expose visibility data directly to your internal agents and assistants.

webhooks.title: Webhooks
webhooks.description: Trigger workflows on every new analysis, alert or score change.

export.title: Clean exports
export.description: Retrieve JSON or CSV data for reports, notebooks and pipelines.

docs.title: Concise docs
docs.description: Simple endpoints, clear schemas and examples you can use right away.

pricing.title: Pricing that scales with volume.
pricing.description: Pick a plan based on how many prompts you analyze each month, then grow without changing your stack.
pricing.volumeHelper: Move the slider to estimate the right plan for your usage.

developer.name: Developer
developer.description: For testing Visia on a few use cases and wiring the API quickly.

starter.name: Starter
starter.description: For small marketing teams that want to track AI visibility without friction.

growth.name: Growth
growth.description: For scaling AI monitoring across countries, products and business units.

pro.name: Pro
pro.description: For advanced teams that need governance, support and tailored workflows.

footer.description: Measure, understand and improve how AI systems talk about your brand.
